series_metadata.series_title: Title VI - Complaint Form and Title VI - Complaint Log
series_metadata.series_description: Title VI – Complaint Form: This form may be used to file a complaint with the Ohio Department of Public Safety for alleged violations of Title VI of the Civil Rights Act of 1964. Title VI – Complaint Log: This form will be used to document a complaint with the Ohio Department of Public Safety for alleged violations of the Civil Rights Act of 1964.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: five (5) years and ; Electronic: five (5) years and
